typography.instructions: Use IBM Plex Sans for general UI text and headings. Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for telemetry values, table data cells, log entries, and code/status readouts to enforce an industrial, precise look.

spacing_and_layout.instructions: Adopt a dense, data-rich layout characteristic of industrial SCADA interfaces. Every pixel must be utilized efficiently. Use strict grid alignments without jagged edges. The Plant Hierarchy Workspace should use a split layout with the tree sidebar occupying 25-30% of width and the tabbed workspace the remainder.

cards.base: bg-[#0D1B3D] border border-[#8799BA]/20 rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden
cards.instructions: Cards should feel flat and solid. Do not use glassmorphism on standard data cards or charts to maintain data legibility.

tables.header: bg-[#091628] text-[#8799BA] text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold border-b border-[#8799BA]/20
tables.instructions: Use Shadcn Table components but customize with JetBrains Mono for data cells. Include status dot indicators using the telemetry status colors.

buttons.primary: bg-[#095FDF] text-[#FFFFFF] hover:bg-[#1A74F0] font-semibold rounded-md transition-colors shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(9,95,223,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#8799BA]/30 text-[#FFFFFF] hover:bg-[#8799BA]/10 rounded-md transition-colors

tabs.trigger: data-[state=active]:bg-[#0D1B3D] data-[state=active]:text-[#00B4D8] text-[#8799BA] font-medium transition-all rounded-sm
tabs.instructions: Tabs should have a clear active state using the Vibration Signal accent color (#00B4D8). Overide default Shadcn tab heights if necessary to fit the dense UI.

tree_view.node: flex items-center py-1.5 px-2 rounded-md cursor-pointer text-sm text-[#8799BA] hover:bg-[#8799BA]/10 transition-colors

glassmorphism.global_nav: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#0D1B3D]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#8799BA]/20
glassmorphism.ai_flyout: fixed right-0 top-0 h-full w-96 bg-[#0D1B3D]/90 backdrop-blur-2xl border-l border-[#8799BA]/30 shadow-2xl
glassmorphism.instructions: Apply glassmorphism strictly to floating or overarching navigational elements (Global Nav, AI Assistant Flyout). NEVER apply to charts or data tables.

charts.tooltip: bg-[#0D1B3D] border border-[#8799BA]/30 text-[#FFFFFF] shadow-lg rounded-md
charts.instructions: Use Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Set cartesian grids to low opacity (#8799BA/10). Donut chart must map Healthy to #2DC4B6, Warning to #F4A822, Critical to #C0392B. Trend/FFT line charts should heavily feature #00B4D8 (cyan) for signal traces.

forms.input: bg-[#091628] border border-[#8799BA]/30 text-[#FFFFFF] rounded-md focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#095FDF] focus:border-[#095FDF] transition-all
forms.label: text-xs font-semibold text-[#8799BA] mb-1.5 uppercase tracking-wide
forms.instructions: For the Maintenance Log Form, use a strict two-column grid. Ensure form controls have sufficient contrast against the deep navy background.

scrollbar.instructions: Implement custom scrollbars globally to avoid unstyled browser defaults breaking the dark immersive theme. Do not use gutters.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle border color shifts and background tinting. Active elements glow slightly.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use fast, precise transitions (150ms-200ms) suitable for a performance-focused tool.
interactions_and_motion.ai_flyout: Slide in from the right edge with a smooth ease-out curve.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text against #0D1B3D and #091628 meets 4.5:1 ratio. The cyan (#00B4D8) and white text have excellent contrast.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must display a distinct focus ring: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#095FDF] focus:outline-none.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add data-testid attributes to all tabs, chart containers, form inputs, buttons, tree nodes, and table rows using kebab-case.

images.description: Close up of an industrial machine with a spiral design, can be used for login screen background or subtle texture.
Close-up of hands using multimeter on motor wires, suitable for Maintenance Log headers or User profile default images.
Industrial complex interior with metal structures and pipes, good for Plant Hierarchy visual context.
Advanced machinery showcasing robotic automation, suitable for feature or header images.

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Utilize these URLs when images are needed in the UI. DO NOT use placeholder text or dummy image URLs. Apply appropriate overlays (e.g., bg-[#091628]/70) if text needs to be placed on top of these images.

screens.1_global_nav_shell: Sticky top header (glassmorphism) + collapsible sidebar. Sidebar contains nav items. Content area expands/collapses based on sidebar state.
screens.2_login: Centered card on a dark immersive background (potentially using the abstract machine image with heavy dark overlay). Includes logo, username, password with eye toggle, remember me, forgot password.
screens.3_overview_dashboard: Control room layout. Features large Donut Motor Health chart, status counter cards (numeric with colored indicators), and a Recent Activity Log list with date-range filter.
screens.4_multi_motor_telemetry_table: Dense data table. Filters + sortable columns. Status dot indicators for health. Pagination at bottom.
screens.5_plant_hierarchy_workspace: Split layout. Left: Tree sidebar (Site -> Area -> Machine -> Sensor). Right: Tabbed workspace (Trend, FFT, Faults, Logs). Must include AI assistant flyout trigger.
screens.6_maintenance_log_form: Two-column form layout. Dropdowns, date picker, notes textarea. Clean, accessible inputs.
screens.7_user_management: Simple, clean data table for user roles and access.
screens.8_grafana_insights: Full width/height iframe container to embed external Grafana dashboards.
